bullets: • One way to address overfitting is to collect more training data.
• Another option is to use fewer features by selecting the most relevant ones.
• Regularization can reduce the impact of some features without eliminating them.
• Regularization encourages smaller parameter values to fit the training data better.
• The lab provides hands-on experience with adjusting data and features to reduce overfitting.
raw:
• One way to address overfitting is to collect more training data.
• Another option is to use fewer features by selecting the most relevant ones.
• Regularization can reduce the impact of some features without eliminating them.
• Regularization encourages smaller parameter values to fit the training data better.
• The lab provides hands-on experience with adjusting data and features to reduce overfitting.
